steps.title: Find the contrast after 'but'
steps.content: The passage sets up a contrast with “but.” Before it, scientists claim mammals were “not very [blank].” After it, Luo's research reveals various plant-eating mammals and gliding species — a range of different types.

steps.title: The blank describes what scientists underestimated
steps.content:
The word must complete: “not very [diverse].” Diverse captures the variety Luo found (multiple types, different diets, different abilities), which contradicts the scientists' claim of uniformity. Predatory doesn't match the plant-eating fossils, obscure doesn't fit what scientists claimed, and localized ignores the variety in behaviors.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
